titleStmt.title: SII 26.275: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 275. (A.R. No. 260 of 1909.) KUṈṈATTŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.

This inscription records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the same deity of the same Jananāthanallūr occurring in No. 274 above, by a woman stated to be the daughter of a certain Sāttuvarappu Puṟṟiḍaṅgoṇḍār of Peruṁpāchchēri. It is stated that the gift was accepted by the temple Śivabrāhmaṇas Gauvutavan (Gautaman) Ammai Appaṉ alias Paṉpāyēśvara-bhaṭṭaṉ and Naṅgai-bhaṭṭaṉ Vaḍuga-bhaṭṭaṉ, who had agreed to burn the lamp accordingly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ koccaṭapanmarāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 7(1/2)
ttu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkkoṭṭattu Āmurnāṭṭu maṇamaiyāṉa jaṉaṉāta
lūr Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Ivūrc cempeṟaṉ tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyārkku
ka perumpācceric cāttuvarappu puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭār makaḷuñ cā ṭai Inṉāyaṉārkku vaitta canti vi
ḷakku 1 viḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavarai Erikkaka kaṭavomākac cammatittuc cilālekai paṇṇi
k kuṭuttom Ikkoyiliṟ civabrāhmaṇaṉ gavutavaṉ Ammai Appaṉāṉa paṉmāyeśvarapaṭṭaṉum naṅkai
paṭṭaṉ vaṭukapaṭṭaṉum Iṭuvom Ivai paṉmāyeśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭukappaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
